news.summary: Dow Jones futures saw a significant drop following Israeli airstrikes on Iran's nuclear facilities, leading to a spike in crude oil prices. President Trump encouraged Iran to negotiate a deal in the midst of the escalating tensions.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop as Israel hits Iran's nuclear sites. Oil prices surge. Trump calls for Iran deal.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited, a leading developer, owner, and operator of integrated resort facilities in Asia and Europe, appointed Mr. John Peter Ben Wang as an independent non-executive director. Mr. Wang will serve as the chairman of the audit and risk committee and as a member of the compensation committee and nominating and corporate governance committee. The board of directors confirmed Mr. Wang's qualification as an "audit committee financial expert" as defined in Item 16A of Form 20-F.
news.headline: Melco appoints John Peter Ben Wang as new independent non-executive director, effective June 13, 2025.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, in Toronto, a renowned company Wavelo, specializing in event-driven software solutions for the telecom industry, revealed its Wavelo Solution Suite successfully obtained the TM Forum Customer Experience Management (CEM) Conformance Certification. This accomplishment signifies Wavelo's dedication in providing exceptional services within the telecom sector. The company is optimistic about the evolving landscape of telecommunications and is committed to delivering innovative solutions to meet the industry's demands.
news.headline: Wavelo gains TM Forum CEM Conformance Certification for its telecom solutions, solidifying its industry leadership.
China to tighten supervision of future market program trading. Futures market program trading rules effective October 9th.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, Jefferson Capital, Inc. revealed the initiation of its roadshow for the planned underwritten IPO. The company, a prominent player in acquiring and handling charged-off and insolvency consumer accounts, is recognized for its analytical approach. This step marks a significant development in the company's journey towards going public, as it aims to attract potential investors for this offering. This move signifies Jefferson Capital's strategic intent to raise capital and expand its operations further.
news.headline: Jefferson Capital begins IPO roadshow on June 13, 2025, to go public as a leading consumer debt purchaser and manager.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, FBS, a prominent international broker, released a recent expert study delving into the potential growth prospects for the crypto market in 2025 due to macroeconomic changes, particularly the normalization of the US Treasury yield curve. The report suggests that after a span of two years, there may be notable opportunities arising for growth as a result of these shifts.
news.headline: FBS analysts predict potential crypto market growth in 2025 due to US Treasury yield curve normalization.

news.summary: Preeti Jha became a part of the home care franchise due to her understanding of the difficulties families encounter when they are unable to personally care for their elderly family members. Operating in Houston, this non-medical, tailored home care services company is known as Caring Senior Service. This decision was made on June 13, 2025.
news.headline: Caring Senior Service opens new location in Sugar Land, Texas; Owner Preeti Jha joins franchise to support families facing caregiving challenges.
Ayatollah Khamenei: The powerful hand of the Islamic Republic's armed forces will not abandon the Zionist regime, God willing.

news.summary: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices California Properties in Beverly Hills proudly announces the recognition of Phil Missig with the prestigious Sports and Entertainment Certification. This honor is reserved for agents within the Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices global Luxury Collection, highlighting Missig's outstanding performance and specialization in catering to high-profile clients such as athletes, actors, industry leaders, and media executives. This certification recognizes Missig's expertise and success in serving this exclusive clientele.
news.headline: Phil Missig receives Sports and Entertainment Certification from Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices for serving high-profile clients.

news.summary: Toronto-based Roots, a leading outdoor-lifestyle brand, released its financial report for the first quarter ending May 3, 2025. The company, traded as ROOT on the TSX, disclosed that all figures are in Canadian dollars unless specified. In the announcement, they emphasized that some metrics, like certain adjusted figures, are non-IFRS measures. Notably, this quarter represents the third consecutive quarter with growth in year-over-year comparisons.
news.headline: Roots reports strong Q1 2025 results, marking third consecutive quarter of year-over-year growth. TSX: ROOT.

news.summary: ARV-393 exhibited substantial efficacy when used as a standalone treatment in preclinical models representing nodal T-follicular helper cell lymphoma, also referred to as AITL, and transformed follicular lymphoma.
news.headline: Arvinas presents preclinical data for ARV-393 at EHA 2025 Congress showcasing significant activity in lymphoma models.

news.summary: New statistics have been released concerning 17 patients, which align with previously shown data. All patients who underwent treatment with BEAM-101 successfully increased their Hemoglobin F (HbF) levels to over 60%, decreased their Hemoglobin S (HbS) levels to under 40%, and resolved their anemia.
news.headline: Beam announces promising data on BEAM-101 for SCD at EHA 2025 Congress: 17 patients show >60% HbF induction, <40% HbS reduction, and anemia resolution.

news.summary: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. disclosed today that ORLADEYO ® (berotralstat) for preventing hereditary angioedema (HAE) attacks in adults and pediatric patients aged 12 and above has been approved by the National Institute of Drug and Food Surveillance (INVIMA) in Colombia. The oral, once-daily medication was given the green light for use.
news.headline: ORLADEYO® approved in Colombia by INVIMA for prophylaxis of HAE attacks in adults and pediatric patients 12+.

news.summary: Houston and London, on June 13, 2025, Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) is set to reveal its second quarter performance for the period ending June 30, 2025, through a press release scheduled for 5 p.m. Eastern Time (4 p.m. Central Time) on Tuesday, July 22, 2025. Analysts and investors can join a webcast slated for 9:30 a.m. Eastern Time (8:30 a.m. Central Time) on Wednesday, July 23, 2025, to delve deeper into the financial outcomes.
news.headline: Baker Hughes to announce Q2 results on July 22, 2025, at 5pm Eastern Time, with webcast to discuss on July 23 at 9:30 am ET.

news.summary: With over four decades of experience in building and supervising commercial entities in the biopharmaceutical sector, Mr. Hunter has held key positions at Validus Pharmaceuticals, Relialab, and Novartis.
news.headline: Tonix Pharmaceuticals appoints James "Jim" Hunter, with 40 years of biopharmaceutical experience, to Board of Directors.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, MoneyHero Limited (Nasdaq: MNY) released its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. MoneyHero is a prominent personal finance aggregation and comparison platform, along with being a digital insurance brokerage provider in Greater Southeast Asia.
news.headline: MoneyHero Group's Q1 2025 results announced; Nasdaq: MNY; leading finance comparison platform; SE Asia; March 31 data.

news.summary: Toronto on June 13, 2025 - NexGold Mining Corp. (TSXV: NEXG; OTCQX: NXGCF) provided an update on its 25,000-meter diamond drill program initiated on January 22, 2025, at Goldboro Project in Nova Scotia. The program aims to enhance geological and grade continuity in specific areas of the open pit Mineral Resource, possibly upgrading certain Inferred and Indicated Mineral Resources. Progress is steady with two diamond drills, and completion is expected by the end of Q2, with final assays anticipated in mid-Q3.
news.headline: NexGold's drilling at Goldboro Project finds 25.79 g/t Gold over 4.5m and 18.09 g/t Gold over 3m. Program nears completion.

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, AYR Wellness Inc. (CSE: AYR.A, OTCQX: AYRWF), headquartered in Miami, declared a delay in submitting its interim financial statements, management’s discussion, analysis, and CEO/CFO certificates for the three-month period closing on March 31, 2025. These documents, referred to as the "Interim Filings," were initially expected to be filed by June 13, 2025.
news.headline: AYR Wellness Inc. delays filing of Q1 2025 interim financial statements; originally due by June 13, 2025.

news.summary: BURLINGTON, Mass - June 13, 2025 - Fractyl Health, Inc. (Nasdaq: GUTS) unveiled plans to showcase new preclinical data at the American Diabetes Association’s (ADA) 85th Scientific Sessions on June 20-23, 2025, in Chicago, Illinois. The data is related to their Rejuva Smart GLP-1 pancreatic gene therapy platform. Fractyl Health, Inc., a metabolic therapeutics company tackling obesity and type 2 diabetes (T2D) causes, aims to introduce this cutting-edge approach at the esteemed event.
news.headline: Fractyl Health to present new preclinical data from Rejuva® Smart GLP-1™ at ADA's 85th Scientific Sessions on June 20-23 in Chicago.
Israeli media: 'Israel is trying to convince the American administration to join the Israeli action.'

news.summary: On June 13, 2025, a Miami-based company, eCapital Corp., revealed that it has renewed and increased the asset-based financing options for its subsidiaries. eCapital is a prominent player in providing specialty finance services to small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) in North America and the U.K. The company's decision to enhance its offerings signals a continued commitment to supporting SMBs in need of financial assistance during these trying times.
news.headline: eCapital increases lending facility to $1.38 billion, boosting market presence for SMBs in NA and U.K.

news.summary: The Beef. It's What's For Dinner. label offers up some steak-centric recipes ideal for fathers who love a good cut. On June 13, 2025, in Denver, a press release reported this. Research from Statista reveals that a high percentage of people prefer grilling steak when celebrating special occasions such as Father's Day.
news.headline: PRNewswire article recommends grilling steak for Father's Day. Statista survey shows consumers prefer steak for celebrating dad.

news.summary: The Central Municipal Court of Atlantic County continues to enhance services and reduce expenses for towns and taxpayers through innovative strategies. As part of a pilot program with Amazon Web Services, the court has implemented a new AI communications platform. This initiative aims to improve efficiency and streamline processes, potentially resulting in significant savings for participating municipalities. The utilization of cutting-edge technology underscores the court's commitment to modernizing operations and delivering cost-effective solutions.
news.headline: Central Municipal Court of Atlantic County implements AI pilot program with Amazon Web Services, enhancing services and reducing costs for participating towns and taxpayers.

news.summary: Atlanta-based Intellum, a leading enterprise learning management technology provider, revealed on June 13, 2025 that its powerful learning management system (LMS) can now be accessed through Google Cloud Marketplace. This new development allows organizations to streamline the process of acquiring, implementing, and utilizing the LMS for their learning needs.
news.headline: Intellum's LMS now on Google Cloud Marketplace, simplifying access for organizations seeking scalable learning solutions.

news.summary: Wavicle Data Solutions, a company specializing in data, analytics, and AI services, has earned a place on the esteemed Chicago list of rapidly expanding businesses. Based in Oak Brook, Illinois, the company solidified its position as one of the fastest-growing companies in the region as of June 13, 2025. Well-known for its expertise in data-related solutions, Wavicle Data Solutions continues to make a significant impact in the industry.
news.headline: Wavicle Data Solutions makes Crain's Fast 50 List for 6th year, recognized as fast-growing company in Chicago region.

news.summary: Dentsu has announced a new partnership with the Criteo Commerce Media Platform stack, aiming to engage consumers at shoppable moments worldwide. On June 13, 2025, Criteo, listed on Nasdaq as CRTO, revealed intentions to enhance their global presence with this collaboration.
news.headline: Global partnership between Criteo and dentsu connects consumers through Commerce Media Platform.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington on June 13, 2025, Evergreen Home Loans® announced the appointment of Walter Gallipeau as the new Area Manager for their expansion into Texas. With over 20 years of experience in finance, Walter will be operating in the Dallas/Fort Worth region. This move signifies Evergreen Home Loans' expansion into Texas.
news.headline: Evergreen Home Loans® appoints Walter Gallipeau as Area Manager, expanding into Texas after 20 years of finance experience.
